case_title: BARRY GEE VS. DEMETRI L. GREEN et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-15-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIGHTNER, JAMES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEE, BARRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, DEMETRI L. $2,448.76 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,518.76, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST JAMES LIGHTNER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
